name: Overnight Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf French bread (8 oz), ends trimmed, cut diagonally into slices about 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a shallow 2 1/2-quart baking dish.
2. Arrange the bread in a single layer in the prepared dish, pressing the slices together if necessary to fit.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the bread slices.
5. Sprinkle cinnamon over the top of the pudding.
6. Cover the dish and refrigerate overnight or up to 24 hours.
7. To serve: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Uncover the baking dish, dot the pudding with butter if desired, and bake for 45 minutes or until set and lightly golden brown.
